Auth.subtitle: Sign in with your name and phone number

step1.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again

step2.title: Confirm sign-in
step2.telegramHint: The bot will open and confirm sign-in automatically. If it doesn't, enter the code the bot sends you.
step2.smsHint: We sent a code by SMS to {phone}
step2.errorExpired: Sign-in session expired, please start again
